name: CMR Surgical
relevance: Versius modular soft-tissue surgical robot; synthetic procedure imagery and force/pose data plus surgical sim are critical since real-procedure data is scarce.

name: Distalmotion
relevance: Dexter soft-tissue surgical robot for hospitals and ASCs; synthetic procedure imagery and surgical sim feed validation before clinical use.

name: ForSight Robotics
relevance: ORYOM platform for cataract and other eye surgery; vision-driven micromechanics need synthetic ophthalmic imagery and procedure sim for training.
note: ORYOM robotic platform for ophthalmic surgery

name: Capstan Medical
relevance: Catheter-based robotic delivery of mitral/aortic valves; synthetic anatomy imagery and procedure sim de-risk real-patient trials.
note: catheter-based robotic structural-heart implant delivery system

name: Surgerii Robotics
relevance: SHURUI single-port endoscopic surgical robot; synthetic procedure imagery and arm-bench sim accelerate cross-specialty validation.

name: Ronovo Surgical
relevance: Carina modular laparoscopic robot configurable across specialties; synthetic procedure imagery and surgical sim feed multi-specialty validation.

name: XCath
relevance: Neuro-endovascular robot steers catheters/guidewires for stroke and aneurysm; sim plus synthetic anatomy data are needed where real-patient trials are scarce.

name: Robeauté
relevance: Rice-grain-sized self-propelled neurosurgical microrobot; brain-tissue sim and synthetic biopsy/therapy imagery are mission-critical pre-clinical.

name: Petal Surgical
relevance: Incisionless surgical system combining acoustic liquefaction, AI, and robotics; physics-tuned tissue sim plus synthetic procedure data are essential pre-clinical.

name: Vitestro
relevance: Aletta autonomous robotic phlebotomy device; vision-guided needle insertion needs synthetic vein imagery and arm-bench sim.

name: Mendaera
relevance: Focalist clips onto an ultrasound probe to guide needle placement; ultrasound-image sim plus synthetic needle-guidance data feed AI training.

name: Cellares
relevance: Cell Shuttle automated factory manufactures cell therapies; arm-bench sim plus small-vessel grasp data fit the Simulation Setup pitch verbatim.
note: Cell Shuttle automated robotic factory for cell therapy manufacturing

name: Automata
relevance: Robotic-arm lab automation for pharma and biotech workflows; arm-bench sim plus small-vial grasp labels are a textbook synthetic-data fit.
